kols.name: Eric Topol
kols.title: Founder & Director, Scripps Research Translational Institute
kols.note: Cardiologist, author, and one of the most prominent voices on AI and individualized medicine.

kols.name: Demis Hassabis
kols.title: CEO, Google DeepMind & Isomorphic Labs
kols.note: Led AlphaFold; Nobel Prize in Chemistry (2024) for protein structure prediction.

kols.name: Daphne Koller
kols.title: Founder & CEO, insitro
kols.note: Pioneer in machine learning building a data-driven, ML-first drug-discovery platform.

kols.name: Regina Barzilay
kols.title: Professor, MIT CSAIL & Jameel Clinic
kols.note: Leads AI research for molecular design and early cancer detection.

kols.name: Vijay Pande
kols.title: General Partner, Andreessen Horowitz (a16z Bio + Health)
kols.note: Founder of Folding@home; influential investor and commentator at the AI–bio interface.
